inputs.label: Span Length
inputs.businessContext: The distance between the supports of the bridge beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance between the supports of the bridge beam.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Abstand zwischen den Auflagern des Brückenträgers.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La distance entre les supports de la poutre du pont.
businessContext_i18n.es: La distancia entre los apoyos de la viga del puente.

inputs.label: Beam Width
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional width of the bridge beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional width of the bridge beam.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la section transversale de la poutre du pont.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la sección transversal de la viga del puente.

inputs.label: Beam Height
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional height (depth) of the bridge beam.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cross-sectional height (depth) of the bridge beam.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur transversale (profondeur) de la poutre du pont.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura transversal (profundidad) de la viga del puente.

inputs.label: Material Ultimate Tensile Strength
inputs.businessContext: Ultimate tensile strength of the beam material.

label_i18n.fr: Résistance ultime à la traction du matériau
label_i18n.es: Resistencia última a la tracción del material

businessContext_i18n.en: Ultimate tensile strength of the beam material.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance ultime à la traction du matériau de la poutre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia última a la tracción del material de la viga.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor of safety applied to material strength for allowable stress.

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor of safety applied to material strength for allowable stress.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzin verilen gerilme için malzeme dayanımına uygulanan güvenlik faktörü.

businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de seguridad aplicado a la resistencia del material para la tensión admisible.
